summary: Enhanced AutoHeal root cause detection tested successfully. All 8 error categories (frontend, backend, database, network, memory, thread, async, dependency) correctly classify errors. Monitoring API endpoints working. 25/25 tests passed.

features_tested.details: MongoDB connection errors correctly classified as 'database' category
Query/aggregate pipeline errors correctly classified as 'database' category
Memory overflow (heap/OOM) and memory leak errors correctly classified as 'memory' category
Unhandled promise rejections and async timeouts correctly classified as 'async' category
SSL certificate and DNS resolution errors correctly classified as 'network' category
Deadlock and race condition errors correctly classified as 'thread' category
Missing modules and version mismatch errors correctly classified as 'dependency' category
React render and state management errors correctly classified as 'frontend' category
API handler and authentication errors correctly classified as 'backend' category
Returns system health summary with status (healthy/degraded/no_data)
Returns all 9 category descriptions (8 categories + unknown) with report counts

features_tested.feature: Diagnose endpoint returns root_cause_category, component, subsystem
features_tested.details: POST /api/autoheal/diagnose returns all required fields including root_cause_category, component, subsystem

autoheal: GET /api/autoheal/root-cause-categories - Returns 9 categories with counts (67 total reports)
POST /api/autoheal/diagnose - Classifies error with root_cause_category, component, subsystem

critical_code_review_comments: EnhancedAutoHealAgent classify_error() method correctly uses keyword pattern matching for 8 root cause categories
Pattern matching order is correct - more specific patterns checked before generic ones
ContinuousMonitor class properly collects CPU/memory/disk metrics and detects anomalies
Root cause categories endpoint aggregates reports by category and provides descriptions for all 9 categories
seed_data_creation: Test diagnose calls created ~25 new autoheal reports in database (one per error classification test)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Enhanced AutoHeal with 8 root cause categories fully tested. Key patterns in enhanced_autoheal_agent.py lines 612-704 define classification keywords. Test file /app/backend/tests/test_enhanced_autoheal.py covers all categories. Monitoring endpoints work but return 'no_data' until monitoring is started and snapshots are collected. 67 total autoheal reports in system with 36.5% auto-resolution rate.
